title: Frahan StonePack
description:
This is an early alpha release of an independent open-source research implementation for stone/geometry-processing workflows in Grasshopper. The tool is experimental and under active development, and the current release is intended for public testing, feedback, and citation of the initial implementation.

Frahan StonePack is a Rhino / Grasshopper plugin for stone-fabrication readiness: a bridge layer between design intent and machine-ready fabrication for dimension stone, monuments, and dry-stone masonry. It covers the pipeline from GPR / scan to fracture mapping and point-cloud discontinuity / joint-set extraction, 3D reconstruction, discrete fracture networks, block packing and cutting, masonry equilibrium, and fabrication export, with a research-grade algorithm library (2D/3D packing, hole-aware no-fit-polygon nesting, block-cut optimization, masonry CRA equilibrium, edge-matching, surface mosaicing, joint-set and Baecher DFN). Released for educational and research use. Note: bundles a non-commercial research-only port of PuzzleFusion++ (Kintsugi module).
